name: Biscuits with Ham Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. Combine sour cream and egg; mix well.
3. Stir the mixture into the dry ingredients just until moistened.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface; knead gently 4 to 5 times.
5. Roll to 1/2 inch thickness. Cut with a 2-1/2-inch biscuit cutter.
6. Place on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 425°F for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Meanwhile, process the ham and butter in a blender or food processor until well mixed.
9. Spread over warm biscuits.
